source.description: Planned six-panel generated raster process sheet for the May 21, 2026 honest archive lesson.
source.notes: One compact box camera sits at a consistent three-quarter angle with its loose strap on warm off-white paper.

process_strategy: The sequence establishes the camera body and strap loop, then lens, viewfinder, buttons, leather seams, and muted graphite/warm-brown tone before a final line-confidence pass.

final_elements.name: camera body box
final_elements.description: A compact rectangular camera body with a slight top plane.

final_elements.name: loose strap loop
final_elements.description: A soft loop of strap falling behind and beside the camera.

final_elements.name: round lens barrel
final_elements.description: A centered circular lens with an outer ring.

final_elements.name: top viewfinder and shutter button
final_elements.description: A small raised viewfinder and one round top button.

final_elements.name: body seams and strap buckle
final_elements.description: Simple leather seam lines and a small buckle on the established strap.

final_elements.name: soft body tone and cast shadow
final_elements.description: Light warm-gray body tone, brown strap tint, and a small cast shadow.

frames.visible_job: Places the rectangular body guide and the loose strap loop.
Adds the round lens barrel to the already placed camera front.
Adds the top viewfinder and shutter button to the existing body.
Adds simple body seams and the small strap buckle without changing the camera pose.
Adds warm-gray body tone, brown strap tint, and a soft shadow to existing shapes.
introduces: soft body tone and cast shadow

final_step.visible_job: Only reinforces existing body edges, lens rings, controls, seam lines, strap buckle, and established tone/shadow.

rejection_checks: No lens, control, strap, buckle, seam, color area, or shadow may first appear in the final panel.
The camera must keep its same three-quarter angle and strap placement in every frame.
The finish must look like a modest pencil study, not a product-render illustration.
